name: Acroud AB (publ)
summary: Acroud AB (publ) owns, develops, and operates comparison and news sites, primarily in iGaming affiliation in Sweden. The company was formerly known as Net Gaming Europe AB (publ) and changed its name to Acroud AB (publ) in July 2020. Acroud AB (publ) was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Gzira, Malta.
